title: NIO Inc. Reports Unaudited First Quarter 2021 Financial Results
text: Q1 2021 vehicle sales reached RMB 7,405.8 million (US$1,130.3 million), representing 489.8% increase from Q1 2020. NIO delivered 20,060 vehicles in Q1 2021, representing 422.7% year-over-year growth. Q2 2021 total revenues reached RMB 8,448.0 million (US$1,308.4 million), up 127.2% from Q2 2020. Vehicle deliveries reached 21,896 in Q2 2021, up 111.9% from Q2 2020. Q3 2021 total revenues reached RMB 9.81 billion or $1.52 billion, up 116.6% year-over-year. Q4 2021 and full year results: quarterly total revenues RMB 9,900.7 million (US$1,553.6 million) with quarterly deliveries 25,034 vehicles. Full year 2021 deliveries reached 91,429 vehicles, up 109.1% from 2020.
